data.title: Wall Street Rally, Small Caps Rocket On Fed Dovish Remarks: What's Moving Markets Friday?
data.description:
Wall Street staged a sharp rebound Friday after a bruising week of volatility in tech, as a wave of dovish comments from Federal Reserve officials flipped market expectations toward a rate cut next month. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/equities/25/11/49011636/wall-street-today-markets-friday-small-caps-homebuilder-stocks-federal-reserve-rate-cut-odds-bitcoin-price-ethereum?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Bitwise’s Solana ETF BSOL reaches $500M AUM milestone
data.description:
Bitwise announced its Solana BSOL ETF with staking broke above $500 in assets under management. Solana ETF saw a streak of inflows for the past 18 days, with Bitwise among the most active SOL buyers.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitwises-solana-etf-bsol-reaches-500m-aum-milestone/

data.title: BitMine Immersion Sitting on $4B Loss on Ether Bet as Analyst Warns of Structural issues
data.description:
BitMine Immersion is currently grappling with a substantial loss amounting to $4 billion stemming from its investments in Ethereum. This dramatic downturn has caught the attention of analysts, who are cautioning that there are deeper structural issues within the market that could exacerbate the situation. These concerns suggest that the challenges facing BitMine Immersion are not merely a result of external market volatility but may also be indicative of fundamental problems that could affect the broader cryptocurrency landscape.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/11/21/bitmine-immersion-sitting-on-usd4b-unrealized-loss-on-ether-bet-as-analyst-warns-of-structural-issues

data.title: PayPay-Binance Integration Marks Japan’s Most User-Friendly Crypto Upgrade
data.description:
Japan’s crypto landscape took a significant leap forward this week as SoftBank-backed PayPay and Binance Japanofficially launched their new integration, allowing users to buy and withdraw crypto directly using PayPay Money.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/paypay-binance-integration-marks-japans-most-user-friendly-crypto-upgrade/

data.title: Beyond Volatility: Why Investors Are Doubling Down on Real-World Assets
data.description:
Institutional capital has continued to shift toward real-world assets, as tokenization expands across BNB Chain, Solana and other networks, supported by clearer regulation, rising TVL and steady demand for cash-flow–backed onchain exposure despite crypto volatility.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/beyond-volatility-why-investors-are-doubling-down-on-real-world-assets/

data.title: Dogecoin’s 6,500% Surge: The Road That Leads From $0.15 To $10 This Cycle
data.description:

source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoins-6500-price-surge/

data.title: Ex-Coinbase lawyer announces run for New York Attorney General, citing crypto policy

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $84K as Fed’s Williams Re-Opens the Door to a December Rate Cut — Here Is Why It Matters
data.description:
"Bitcoin has made a notable recovery, rising above the $84,000 mark following comments from the Federal Reserve's Williams, who has hinted at the possibility of a rate cut in December. This development is significant for several reasons: it not only reflects investor optimism in the cryptocurrency market but also suggests a changing economic landscape that could impact monetary policy and, consequently, the value of digital assets."
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-rebounds-above-84k-as-feds-williams-re-opens-the-door-to-a-december-rate-cut-here-is-why-it-matters/
